title: Sorry, your agent is not allowed
title_translation: 抱歉，你的智能体被拒之门外

paragraphs.source: Agents can also be blocked from major sites, with this dynamic playing out between ChatGPT Agent and Amazon.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Agents can also be blocked from major sites, with this dynamic playing out between ChatGPT Agent and Amazon.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Agents can also be blocked from major sites, with this dynamic playing out between ChatGPT Agent and Amazon.

pro.text: 智能体也可能被各大网站屏蔽，这正是ChatGPT智能体与亚马逊之间正在上演的博弈。

applied_terms: Ensure 'Agent' is consistently translated as '智能体'.
Translate 'contingent on details' to reflect corporate negotiation realities (取决于/附带...条件).
Maintain a forward-looking, analytical tone regarding platform politics (平台博弈).

understanding.role_in_article: Explores the political, commercial, and platform-level roadblocks to Agent deployment in the real world.
understanding.relation_to_previous: Expands specifically on the 'defensive posturing' and barriers to adoption introduced at the end of the previous section.
key_points: Major platforms (e.g., Amazon) are actively blocking AI agents (e.g., ChatGPT Agent).
Access requires complex backend negotiations and platform politics.
Deals may be contingent on leveraging cloud and hardware resources.
translation_notes: Ensure 'Agent' is consistently translated as '智能体'.
Translate 'contingent on details' to reflect corporate negotiation realities (取决于/附带...条件).
Maintain a forward-looking, analytical tone regarding platform politics (平台博弈).

issues.description: 译文“就正在上演这种动态”略显生硬，带有翻译腔。原文“this dynamic playing out”在商业分析语境下，更自然的表达是描述为“正在上演的博弈”或“正在发生的情况”。
译文“允许智能体在平台上购物”存在歧义，可能被理解为亚马逊主动允许。原文“agents shopping on the platform”描述的是智能体（代表用户）在平台上购物的行为本身，而亚马逊的“此举”（this move）指的是“屏蔽智能体”。逻辑链是：如果允许智能体购物（行为），会导致用户绕过广告（后果），所以亚马逊屏蔽智能体（举措）是合理的。
“后者正是当前上演的情况”与前一段的“这种动态”略有重复，且“上演的情况”搭配稍显生硬。可以更简洁地过渡。
“免费用户的货币化”表述准确，但在中文商业分析语境中，“变现”比“货币化”更常用、更自然。
“搭建”智能体略显口语化，在技术语境下，“部署”或“构建”更为常见。“RL即服务”的翻译正确，但首次出现时，可以考虑加注英文缩写，尽管术语表已定义，但在密集段落中首次出现时提示读者仍有益处。

paragraphs.source: For Amazon, this move makes sense: agents shopping on the platform will allow users to sidestep any ads on the platform. Amazon could restrict the ecosystem to their own model, Nova and Rufus, or leverage access in negotiations.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: For Amazon, this move makes sense: agents shopping on the platform will allow users to sidestep any ads on the platform. Amazon could restrict the ecosystem to their own model, Nova and Rufus, or leverage access in negotiations.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: For Amazon, this move makes sense: agents shopping on the platform will allow users to sidestep any ads on the platform. Amazon could restrict the ecosystem to their own model, Nova and Rufus, or leverage access in negotiations.

pro.text: 对亚马逊而言，此举合乎情理：因为如果允许智能体在平台上（代表用户）购物，用户就能绕过平台上的所有广告。亚马逊可以将生态系统限制在自家的模型（如Nova和Rufus）内，或者在谈判中以此作为筹码。

paragraphs.source: The latter is exactly what is playing out. OpenAI is in talks with Amazon to get access to the shopping platform, though this may be contingent on details relating to the use of Amazon’s cloud and chips. We anticipate companies like Google, Meta, Microsoft, and X will all restrict access to their ecosystems to the greatest extent possible, though this may be limited by antitrust concerns.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: The latter is exactly what is playing out. OpenAI is in talks with Amazon to get access to the shopping platform, though this may be contingent on details relating to the use of [Amazon’s cloud and chips](https://semianalysis.com/accelerator-hbm-model/). We anticipate companies like Google, Meta, Microsoft, and X will all restrict access to their ecosystems to the greatest extent possible, though this may be limited by antitrust concerns.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: The latter is exactly what is playing out. OpenAI is in talks with Amazon to get access to the shopping platform, though this may be contingent on details relating to the use of Amazon’s cloud and chips. We anticipate companies like Google, Meta, Microsoft, and X will all restrict access to their ecosystems to the greatest extent possible, though this may be limited by antitrust concerns.

pro.text: 后者正是当前局势的焦点。OpenAI正在与亚马逊谈判，以获取其购物平台的访问权限，但这可能取决于与使用亚马逊云和芯片相关的细节条件。我们预计，谷歌、Meta、微软和X等公司也将在最大程度上限制对其生态系统的访问，尽管反垄断担忧可能对此有所制约。
pro.tokenized_text: 后者正是当前局势的焦点。OpenAI正在与亚马逊谈判，以获取其购物平台的访问权限，但这可能取决于与使用[[[LINK_1|亚马逊云和芯片]]]相关的细节条件。我们预计，谷歌、Meta、微软和X等公司也将在最大程度上限制对其生态系统的访问，尽管反垄断担忧可能对此有所制约。

“后者正是当前上演的情况”与前一段的“这种动态”略有重复，且“上演的情况”搭配稍显生硬。可以更简洁地过渡。
“免费用户的货币化”表述准确，但在中文商业分析语境中，“变现”比“货币化”更常用、更自然。
“搭建”智能体略显口语化，在技术语境下，“部署”或“构建”更为常见。“RL即服务”的翻译正确，但首次出现时，可以考虑加注英文缩写，尽管术语表已定义，但在密集段落中首次出现时提示读者仍有益处。

paragraphs.source: Central to deals like the Amazon and OpenAI one is the monetization of free users. There is precedent to this: OpenAI announced “Instant Checkout,” integrated with Shopify and Etsy. We called this out as a potential path for agents in August.

inline_elements.text: OpenAI announced “Instant Checkout,” integrated with Shopify and Etsy

paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: Central to deals like the Amazon and OpenAI one is the monetization of free users. There is precedent to this: [OpenAI announced “Instant Checkout,” integrated with Shopify and Etsy](https://x.com/OpenAI/status/1972708279043367238). We called this out as a potential path for agents in August.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: Central to deals like the Amazon and OpenAI one is the monetization of free users. There is precedent to this: OpenAI announced “Instant Checkout,” integrated with Shopify and Etsy. We called this out as a potential path for agents in August.

parent_inline_elements.text: OpenAI announced “Instant Checkout,” integrated with Shopify and Etsy

pro.text: 像亚马逊与OpenAI这类交易的核心，在于免费用户的变现。这已有先例：OpenAI曾宣布与Shopify和Etsy集成的“即时结账”功能。我们在去年八月就曾指出，这可能是智能体发展的潜在路径。
pro.tokenized_text: 像亚马逊与OpenAI这类交易的核心，在于免费用户的变现。这已有先例：[[[LINK_1|OpenAI曾宣布与Shopify和Etsy集成的“即时结账”功能]]]。我们在去年八月就曾指出，这可能是智能体发展的潜在路径。

paragraphs.source: When it comes to enterprise, many are setting up their own agents. They often contract with other startups which conduct “RL as a service” for them, provided a specific task or workload.
paragraphs.parent_block_markdown: When it comes to enterprise, many are setting up their own agents. They often contract with other startups which conduct “RL as a service” for them, provided a specific task or workload.
paragraphs.parent_block_plain_text: When it comes to enterprise, many are setting up their own agents. They often contract with other startups which conduct “RL as a service” for them, provided a specific task or workload.

pro.text: 在企业层面，许多公司正在部署自己的智能体。它们通常与其他初创公司签订合同，由后者为其提供针对特定任务或工作负载的“强化学习即服务”（RL as a Service）。

Deals may be contingent on leveraging cloud and hardware resources.
translation_notes: Ensure 'Agent' is consistently translated as '智能体'.
Translate 'contingent on details' to reflect corporate negotiation realities (取决于/附带...条件).
Maintain a forward-looking, analytical tone regarding platform politics (平台博弈).

issues.description: 译文“就正在上演这种动态”略显生硬，带有翻译腔。原文“this dynamic playing out”在商业分析语境下，更自然的表达是描述为“正在上演的博弈”或“正在发生的情况”。
译文“允许智能体在平台上购物”存在歧义，可能被理解为亚马逊主动允许。原文“agents shopping on the platform”描述的是智能体（代表用户）在平台上购物的行为本身，而亚马逊的“此举”（this move）指的是“屏蔽智能体”。逻辑链是：如果允许智能体购物（行为），会导致用户绕过广告（后果），所以亚马逊屏蔽智能体（举措）是合理的。
“后者正是当前上演的情况”与前一段的“这种动态”略有重复，且“上演的情况”搭配稍显生硬。可以更简洁地过渡。
“免费用户的货币化”表述准确，但在中文商业分析语境中，“变现”比“货币化”更常用、更自然。
“搭建”智能体略显口语化，在技术语境下，“部署”或“构建”更为常见。“RL即服务”的翻译正确，但首次出现时，可以考虑加注英文缩写，尽管术语表已定义，但在密集段落中首次出现时提示读者仍有益处。
